creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Jan  3 11:36:06 2013
New Revision: 309868
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309868

Log:
  - update to 1.2.7
  
  PR:		174922
  Submitted by:	Gasol Wu <gasol.wu@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/pear-PHP_CodeCoverage/Makefile
  head/devel/pear-PHP_CodeCoverage/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/pear-PHP_CodeCoverage/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/pear-PHP_CodeCoverage/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:35:28 2013	(r309867)
+++ head/devel/pear-PHP_CodeCoverage/Makefile	Thu Jan  3 11:36:06 2013	(r309868)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	PHP_CodeCoverage
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.7
 CATEGORIES=	devel pear
 MASTER_SITES=	http://pear.phpunit.de/get/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	pear-
@@ -30,9 +30,6 @@ OPTIONS_DEFINE=	DOM XDEBUG
 DOM_DESC=	Enable DOM support
 XDEBUG_DESC=	Enable Xdebug support
 
-DEFAULT_PHP_VER=5
-IGNORE_WITH_PHP=4
-
 .include <bsd.port.options.mk>
 
 .if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOM}
